M-071.NAME: matrix-style-system
M-071.path: frontend/src/index.css frontend-admin/src/index.css frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs scripts/phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs scripts/phase61-responsive-adaptation-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-52.xml docs/plans/Phase-53.xml docs/plans/Phase-54.xml docs/plans/Phase-55.xml docs/plans/Phase-56.xml docs/plans/Phase-59.xml docs/plans/Phase-67.xml docs/plans/Phase-68.xml docs/plans/Phase-70.xml scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs scripts/phase68-dashboard-subscription-smoke.mjs scripts/phase70-config-qr-parity-smoke.mjs
M-071.owns: Shared KrotPN Matrix visual language: color tokens, compact panels, CRT scanlines, neon flicker, glitch accents, focus states, and mobile-safe responsive rules.

reference.source-1: TRUFFLEX styles.css neon flicker, scanline, glitch, matrix fade, and reduced-motion CSS blocks.
reference.source-2: KrotPN compact UI rules from M-038 remain binding for operational dashboards.

public-interfaces.interface-1: CSS custom properties for KrotPN Matrix palette, surfaces, borders, focus rings, and status colors.
public-interfaces.interface-2: Reusable class layer for matrix-visual-shell, matrix-canvas, matrix-rain-fallback, matrix-scanline-overlay, matrix-vignette, and matrix-visual-content surfaces.
public-interfaces.interface-3: Reduced-motion and mobile viewport rules shared by user and admin frontends.
public-interfaces.interface-4: Phase-53 user route classes for matrix-auth-screen, matrix-auth-card, matrix-layout-frame, matrix-page, matrix-action-grid, matrix-terminal, matrix-copy-box, matrix-row, and matrix-icon-tile.
public-interfaces.interface-5: Phase-54 admin route classes for admin-login-shell, admin-login-card, admin-hero-strip, compact-toolbar, mini-kpi-grid, bounded-scroll, chart-frame, admin-route-card, and matrix-mini-card.
public-interfaces.interface-6: Phase-55 premium art-direction tokens for balanced palette, compact typography, density, logo sizing, shadow, focus, and reduced-motion shell rules.
public-interfaces.interface-7: Phase-56 public/auth classes for matrix-public-page, matrix-public-hero, matrix-public-band, matrix-public-tariff, matrix-brand-logo, and matrix-auth-brand-lockup.
public-interfaces.interface-8: Phase-59 motion classes for motion-route-enter, motion-interactive, motion-copy-success, motion-feedback-success/error, motion-status, and reduced-motion fallbacks.
public-interfaces.interface-9: Phase-71 implemented classes for frameless protected logo, icon-only QR close, selected-device master-detail rows, sticky mobile config actions, and pulsing subscription boundary dates.

constraints.constraint-1: Preserve compact operational UX: no marketing landing page, no nested cards, no decorative card-heavy dashboards.
constraints.constraint-2: Matrix green may be the signature color, but the final palette must use controlled cyan, magenta, neutral, warning, and danger accents so the UI is not a one-note green surface.
constraints.constraint-3: Text must not overlap icons, controls, status badges, charts, rows, or adjacent content at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, tablet, and desktop viewports.
constraints.constraint-4: Glitch, scanline, and flicker effects must not reduce readability of form fields, tariff prices, proxy secrets, VPN config actions, admin tables, or incident controls.
constraints.constraint-5: Do not change API contracts, data shapes, auth state, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or backend runtime behavior.
constraints.constraint-6: Matrix background visibility must not depend on canvas-only rendering; CSS fallback must cover the full viewport with mobile overscan and no pointer interception.

acceptance.metric-1: User and admin builds pass with shared Matrix CSS tokens applied.
acceptance.metric-2: Viewport smoke confirms no horizontal scroll, no visible text overlap, and stable control dimensions.
acceptance.metric-3: Reduced-motion mode disables transform-heavy and flicker-heavy effects while preserving visual identity.
acceptance.metric-4: Screenshot review confirms Matrix style is present without hiding primary VPN, MTProto, tariff, or admin actions.
acceptance.metric-5: Mobile screenshots confirm the Matrix rain/fallback layer reaches the bottom edge with no visible black cutoff.

evidence.local-2026-06-03: Phase-52 added Matrix palette tokens, canvas/scanline/vignette/content layers, focus-visible rules, reduced-motion CSS policy, protected-surface smoke markers, user/admin builds, and Chrome screenshot checks for mobile, desktop, and reduced-motion login shells.
evidence.phase-53-local-2026-06-03: Phase-53 added compact Matrix user route primitives, removed the heavy login hero, strengthened auth contrast after screenshot review, passed frontend build and Phase-53 smoke, and captured readable production-preview mobile/desktop/reduced-motion auth screenshots.
evidence.phase-54-verification-design-2026-06-03: Phase-54 verification gates require compact Matrix admin route surfaces, readable tables/charts/forms, focus-visible controls, reduced-motion proof, no horizontal overflow, no text/icon overlap, balanced palette, and protected-surface isolation.
evidence.phase-54-local-2026-06-03: Phase-54 added compact Matrix admin primitives, retuned admin login/layout/routes, passed frontend-admin build and Phase-54 smoke, and kept protected deploy/install/runtime surfaces unchanged.
evidence.phase-55-local-2026-06-03: Phase-55 added premium Matrix art-direction tokens to user/admin CSS, removed decorative radial/orb shell backgrounds, passed frontend/admin builds, Phase-55 static/screenshot smoke, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected deploy/install guard.
evidence.phase-56-local-2026-06-03: Phase-56 added compact premium public/auth CSS primitives, logo lockup rules, public tariff preview styling, passed Phase-52/53/55 style regressions plus Phase-56 screenshots, and kept protected deploy/install/runtime surfaces unchanged.
evidence.phase-59-local-2026-06-04: Phase-59 added short-duration motion budget tokens, route entrance transitions, feedback/status classes, reduced-motion fallbacks, and Phase-59 smoke markers to user/admin CSS; frontend/admin builds and style regressions passed.
evidence.phase-67-local-2026-06-04: Phase-67 added splash/auth CSS primitives for frameless panels, large unframed logo, red auth focus, icon-safe fields, compact animated primary/secondary actions, phone/tablet rules, and reduced-motion fallback; Phase-55/56/59/60/61/67 smokes passed.
evidence.rainfix-local-2026-06-04: Added .matrix-rain-fallback, CSS rain animation, 100dvh+128px canvas/fallback overscan, normal canvas blend mode, and reduced-motion fallback positions to user/admin CSS. Phase-52/59/61/67/60 smokes, user/admin builds, Chrome screenshots, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.
evidence.phase-68-local-2026-06-04: Added frameless user-shell logo CSS, compact dashboard subscription panel styles, responsive tariff grid, and compact cross-month calendar rules; Phase-68/57/62/61/60 smokes and builds passed.
evidence.phase-70-local-2026-06-04: Phase-70 preserved the compact config page style system and used route-local QR spacing/size adjustments in Config.tsx rather than adding global CSS bloat; frontend build and Phase-70 smoke passed.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Support the compact master-detail config page, icon-only modal close, frameless transparent PNG logo presentation, and start/end calendar pulse borders without text overlap or motion overload.
phase-71-executed-scope.verification: Style smoke must preserve reduced-motion fallbacks, no horizontal scroll, no nested-card bloat, and no protected deploy/runtime diffs.

phase-67-verification-design.scope: Frontend auth-only style polish for frameless public/auth screens without changing user cabinet or admin layout contracts.
phase-67-verification-design.selectors: Planned auth primitives include frameless matrix-auth-screen variants, large unframed logo sizing, icon-safe input padding, red focus/active border states, hover/active input reactions, elegant primary buttons, side-by-side secondary auth actions, and reduced-motion fallbacks.
phase-67-verification-design.guards: No visible matrix-auth-card frame on /login, /register, /forgot-password, or /reset-password; no blue/cyan auth focus border where Phase-67 requires red; no icon/placeholder/text overlap at phone/tablet/desktop viewports.

crosslinks.phase-52: Defines the foundation token system and shared effects.
crosslinks.phase-53: Applies the system to user cabinet routes.
crosslinks.phase-54: Applies the system to admin console routes.
crosslinks.phase-55: Extends the system with premium art-direction tokens before Phase-56/57/58 route work.
crosslinks.phase-56: Applies the premium style system to the public entry route and auth surfaces.
crosslinks.phase-59: Adds bounded motion and microinteraction primitives to the premium Matrix style system.
crosslinks.phase-67: Adds frameless auth, red-focus form, and splash styling constraints for the next public/auth polish wave.
crosslinks.rainfix: Adds CSS rain fallback and mobile overscan constraints for Matrix background reliability.
crosslinks.phase-68: Adds compact dashboard subscription merge styling and frameless user-shell logo treatment.
crosslinks.phase-70: Keeps QR page compaction and payload parity markers within the existing compact Matrix config workflow.
crosslinks.phase-71: Implements master-detail config UX styling, icon close polish, subscription boundary emphasis, and final frameless cabinet logo correction.

M-071.phase-71-evidence: Frontend build and Phase-71 smoke passed for master-detail CSS, selected-row state, icon-only QR close, frameless user logo, calendar boundary pulse, and reduced-motion fallback.
